name: Paul Reiser
bio: Paul Reiser is an American stand-up comedian, actor and writer who built his early career on observational comedy about relationships and everyday life. He rose to wide fame co-creating and starring in the sitcom Mad About You, and released the HBO stand-up special Out on a Whim in 1987 before returning to stand-up specials decades later.

timeline.ev: HBO special Out on a Whim
Mad About You premieres on NBC
Special Life, Death and Rice Pudding

accolades: Ranked 77th on Comedy Centrals 100 Greatest Stand-ups of All Time
Co-creator and star of Mad About You
